zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短期回调，趋势仍偏多
zh.content:
当前BNB价格位于709.23美元，较日内低点707.31略高，但整体下跌1.41%，显示短线承压。20日简单移动平均线(SMA)在687.89美元之上，表明整体中期趋势仍偏多，多头仍占优。MACD主线为17.677，信号线未显示，但主线正值暗示动能偏强，但需关注短期回调风险。

价格近期在720美元附近受阻，多次未能突破该水平，形成明显阻力位；下方支撑位在700美元及685美元附近，短线跌破可能加速调整。RSI未提供，但结合价格与SMA走势，可判断短线存在一定超买压力，谨防价格出现回撤。

交易策略上，建议关注支撑位附近的买入机会，采用分批建仓策略以降低风险。短期内若突破720美元阻力，可考虑加仓追多，但同时需设置止损于685美元以下，以防意外下破支撑。对中长线投资者，可继续持有并观察动能变化。

综合来看，BNB/USD短期承压回调，但整体趋势偏多，支撑稳固，阻力明确。投资者应结合价格行为与技术指标动态调整仓位，利用关键支撑进行低吸，同时密切关注阻力位突破情况，防止追高风险。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD remains in a constructive medium-term uptrend, with the current price at 709.23 trading comfortably above the 20-day SMA at 687.89. Despite the 24-hour decline of 1.41%, the broader technical structure continues to favor buyers as long as price action remains above the moving average. The pullback from the session high of 720.06 appears more consistent with short-term profit-taking than a confirmed trend reversal.

Momentum indicators provide a generally positive outlook. The MACD reading of 17.68 remains in positive territory, suggesting bullish momentum is still present, although the absence of a signal-line value limits confirmation of momentum strength. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions. Even so, the combination of a positive MACD and price trading above the SMA indicates that buyers continue to maintain underlying market control.

From a price-structure perspective, immediate support is located near the session low around 707, with stronger support emerging in the 690-688 region where the 20-day SMA currently resides. A decisive break below this zone could expose further downside toward 675. On the upside, resistance is visible near 720, followed by a more significant barrier around 730-740. A sustained move above 720 would strengthen the case for a continuation of the prevailing bullish trend.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish bias while price remains above the 688 support area. Conservative participants could wait for a confirmed breakout above 720 before initiating new long positions, targeting the 730-740 region. Alternatively, short-term traders may look for pullback entries near support levels with disciplined risk management. A daily close below the 20-day SMA would weaken the bullish outlook and warrant a more defensive approach.
